languages.text: {n}Консоль явно предназначена для управления процессом превращения живого или неживого объекта, расположенного на центральной платформе, в его бесплотную копию. Ваше внимание привлекает крайняя правая цепь глифов — они мигают, как и крупная сфера над ними. Похоже, это говорит о том, что текущая жертва еще жива. Крайняя левая же цепочка отделена от всех остальных сияющей рамкой. Сфера над ней горит ярко и ровно, а символы по количеству и виду сходны с теми, что выгравированы на движущихся частях ксеномеханизма. Возможно, это узел управления подачей Движущей Силы в установку.{/n}

{n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large orb above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Консоль явно предназначена для управления процессом превращения живого или неживого объекта, расположенного на центральной платформе, в его бесплотную копию. Крайняя левая же цепочка отделена от всех остальных сияющей рамкой. Сфера над ней горит ярко и ровно, а символы по количеству и виду сходны с теми, что выгравированы на движущихся частях ксеномеханизма. Возможно, это узел управления подачей Движущей Силы в установку.{/n}

languages.text: {n}このコンソールは、中央のプラットフォームにある生きたものや無生物を、その無体なコピーに変換するプロセスを制御するために設計されている。右端の文字列に注目してほしい。それは、それの上にある大きな水晶と同じように点滅している。これは、現在の犠牲者がまだ生きていることを示しているようだ。左端の文字列は、光る枠で他の文字列から隔てられている。その上の宝石は明るく安定して燃え、その記号は、異星人の装置の動く部分に刻まれた記号と、数と形が似ている。おそらくこれは、この機械に電力を供給するコントロールセンターである。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large crystal above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The gem above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}このコンソールは、中央のプラットフォームにある生きたものや無生物を、その無体なコピーに変換するプロセスを制御するために設計されている。右端の文字列に注目してほしい。それは、それの上にある大きな水晶と同じように点滅している。これは、現在の犠牲者がまだ生きていることを示しているようだ。左端の文字列は、光る枠で他の文字列から隔てられている。その上の宝石は明るく安定して燃え、その記号は、異星人の装置の動く部分に刻まれた記号と、数と形が似ている。おそらくこれは、この機械に電力を供給するコントロールセンターである。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Claramente, la consola está diseñada para controlar el proceso de transformar un ser vivo u objeto inanimado en una versión incorpórea de sí misma. Te llama la atención la cadena derecha de glifos, que parpadea a la par que el gran orbe que tiene encima. Parece indicar que la víctima actual sigue viva. La cadena de la izquierda está separada de las demás por un marco brillante. El orbe que tiene encima arde con luz firme. Los símbolos son similares en aspecto y número a los que hay grabados en las partes móviles del xenodispositivo. Es posible que sea el centro de control de energía de la máquina.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large orb above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Claramente, la consola está diseñada para controlar el proceso de transformar un ser vivo u objeto inanimado en una versión incorpórea de sí misma. Te llama la atención la cadena derecha de glifos, que parpadea a la par que el gran orbe que tiene encima. Parece indicar que la víctima actual sigue viva. La cadena de la izquierda está separada de las demás por un marco brillante. El orbe que tiene encima arde con luz firme. Los símbolos son similares en aspecto y número a los que hay grabados en las partes móviles del xenodispositivo. Es posible que sea el centro de control de energía de la máquina.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这座控制台显然是用来操控转化程序的：它能将中心平台上的目标——无论是活物还是死物——转化为某种无形的虚像。你的注意力被最右侧的符文链吸引，它正连同其上方的大型球体一起闪烁着。这似乎表明，当前的受害对象还活着。最左侧的符文链则被一道发光的框架隔开，符文数量和样式与这台异形设备活动部件上的刻痕相似。其上方的球体明亮而稳定地燃烧着。这里多半就是整台机器的能源控制中枢。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large orb above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这座控制台显然是用来操控转化程序的：它能将中心平台上的目标——无论是活物还是死物——转化为某种无形的虚像。你的注意力被最右侧的符文链吸引，它正连同其上方的大型球体一起闪烁着。这似乎表明，当前的受害对象还活着。最左侧的符文链则被一道发光的框架隔开，符文数量和样式与这台异形设备活动部件上的刻痕相似。其上方的球体明亮而稳定地燃烧着。这里多半就是整台机器的能源控制中枢。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Konsole kontrolliert eindeutig die Transformation eines lebenden oder unbelebten Objektes auf der zentralen Plattform in eine körperlose Kopie seiner selbst. Dein Blick fällt auf die äußerste rechte Kette aus Glyphen ... sie blinken im Takt der großen Kugel über ihnen. Offenbar zeigt das Blinken an, dass das aktuelle Opfer noch lebt. Die äußerste linke Kette ist durch einen leuchtenden Rahmen von allen anderen getrennt. Die Kugel über ihr strahlt hell und beständig. Anzahl und Aussehen der Symbole ähnelt den Symbolen auf den beweglichen Teilen des Xenogerätes. Vielleicht ist dies das Kontrollzentrum für die Energieversorgung der Maschine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large orb above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}

Die äußerste linke Kette ist durch einen leuchtenden Rahmen von allen anderen getrennt. Die Kugel über ihr strahlt hell und beständig. languages.text: {n}Konsolun, merkez platformda bulunan canlı veya cansız bir nesneyi kendisinin cisimsiz bir kopyasına dönüştürme sürecini kontrol etmek için tasarlandığı açık. Dikkatin, en sağdaki glif zincirine çekiliyor. Üzerlerindeki büyük küre gibi onlar da yanıp sönüyor. Bu, mevcut kurbanın hâlâ hayatta olduğunu gösteriyor gibi. En soldaki zincir, parlayan bir çerçeveyle diğerlerinden ayrılmış. Üzerindeki küre parlak ve sabit bir şekilde yanıyor ve semboller, sayı ve görünüş bakımından zeno cihazının hareketli parçalarına kazınmış olanlara benziyor. Belki de burası, makineye güç sağlayan kontrol merkezidir.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. Your attention is drawn to the rightmost chain of glyphs — they are flashing, as is the large orb above them. This seems to indicate that the current victim is still alive. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}

Belki de burası, makineye güç sağlayan kontrol merkezidir.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cette console est clairement conçue pour contrôler le processus de transformation d'un objet vivant ou inanimé placé sur la plateforme centrale en une copie immatérielle de lui-même. La chaîne de glyphes à droite attire tout particulièrement votre attention : elle clignote, de même que le grand orbe qui la surplombe. Vous en déduisez qu'il s'agit là d'un signal indiquant que la victime est encore en vie. La chaîne la plus à gauche est séparée des autres par un cadre brillant. L'orbe qui l'accompagne brille d'un éclat vif et constant. Quant aux symboles, ils sont similaires en nombre et en apparence à ceux gravés sur les parties mobiles de l'appareil xénos. Il s'agit peut-être du centre de contrôle de l'alimentation de la machine.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The console is clearly designed to control the process of transforming a living or inanimate object located on the centre platform into an incorporeal copy of itself. The leftmost chain is separated from all the others by a shining frame. The orb above it burns bright and steady, and the symbols are similar in number and appearance to those engraved on the moving parts of the xenodevice. Perhaps this is the control centre for the supply of power to the machine.{/n}
